title: scandix stellata var. velutina
intro: Scandix stellata var. velutina, also known as velvet buttonweed or velvet small centaury, is a plant species that belongs to the Apiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Scandix stellata var. velutina include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support skin health and alleviate digestive issues.
